DatasetTitle: KNOWLEDGE OF ULSTER-SCOTS BY AGE BY SEX
StatisticalPopulations: All usual residents aged 3 and over
Annotations: 1.  An ability to speak, read or write Ulster-Scots does not imply an ability to understand Ulster-Scots unless stated. Persons in these categories may or may not have the ability to understand Ulster-Scots.; 2. 'Age' is age at last birthday.;
